title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026

detail.title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026
detail.short_info: Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026 is open from April 9 to April 17, 2026. Apply for the KSEAB 2nd PUC Exam 2 (Supplementary) scheduled from April 30. Check dates, steps, and direct links here.

sections.heading: Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026

content.text: Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026 is now open for students who did not clear the Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam 1 2026. The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) conducts Exam 2 (Supplementary) from April 30 to May 13, 2026. Students can submit the online application form from April 9 to April 17, 2026.

Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam 2 is the supplementary opportunity for students who failed or want to improve in one or more subjects after the main Exam 1. The application process is usually handled through respective colleges/schools with online registration on the official KSEAB portal. Applications must be submitted along with the required fee challan.
Direct Link to Check the Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Details: Click Here

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)

sections.heading: Important Dates for Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam 2026
Eligibility Criteria for Karnataka 2nd PUC Exam 2 2026

rows: Students who failed in one or more subjects in 2nd PUC Exam 1 2026
Students who want to improve marks in any subject

sections.heading: How to Apply for Karnataka 2nd PUC Supplementary Exam Online Application Form 2026 ?

items: Visit your respective college or the official KSEAB registration portal.
Collect the application form or register online for Exam-2.
Fill in required details (Registration Number, Subjects, etc.).
Pay the fee through challan and submit the original challan with the form.

content.text: The exam pattern for Supplementary Exam 2 remains the same as the main exam.

items: Timings: Morning session (usually 10:15 AM to 1:30 PM)
